business.name: Junk removal service + handyman
business.tagline: Clear it out, fix it up

hero.headline: Clear it out, *fix it up* — one call does both
hero.subheadline: Junk removal AND handyman repairs. Same crew, same trip, done right.

services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Haul & Fix in One Trip
services_section.subheading: Why hire two crews when one can handle both jobs?

services.title: Furniture & Appliance Removal
services.description: Beds, couches, refrigerators, washers — we haul it all out safely and clean up after.

services.title: Construction Debris Cleanup
services.description: Renovation mess, old fixtures, drywall scraps. We clear the space so you can move forward.

services.title: Same-Day Repairs
services.description: Broken doors, loose fixtures, minor plumbing issues. Fix what needs fixing while we're there.

services.title: Property Cleanouts
services.description: Basements, garages, whole houses. Complete clearing with optional repair work included.

about.heading: One Team, Two Skills
about.body: Atlanta junk removal with handyman skills. We show up on time, work fast, and fix things while we're at it.

reviews.name: Mel N.
reviews.text: Muhammad removed my full bedroom set, couch, and chair with ottoman all by himself. I was in a bind and he helped with such professionalism and kindness!

reviews.name: Hafid Z.
reviews.text: Outstanding service! Done with high efficiency and great attention to detail. The team was polite, on time, and made the whole process smooth.

reviews.name: Alissa R.
reviews.text: Went above and beyond during our pickup. Honest pricing, same day removal, and friendly service. Will absolutely recommend to family and friends.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Metro Atlanta
service_areas.subheading: Fast response across the Atlanta area

cta.heading: Ready to clear out and fix up?
cta.body: Call now for honest pricing and same-day service. One crew handles both jobs.
